channel.title: en-US on Lucas Chen's Archie
channel.description: Recent content in en-US on Lucas Chen's Archie

item.title: OGNL 语言指南(OGNL Language Guide)
item.description: 翻译自 Apache 官网 OGNL 的语言指南。

item.title: Maven
item.description:
Maven 相关知识总结。

包含以下部分：

  1. 配置
  2. 核心概念
  3. POM
  4. 命令行操作
  5. 依赖
  6. 继承

item.title: Nginx 基础(Nginx Basic)
item.description:
How to use nginx easily.

The following sections are included:

  1. Install
  2. Configuration
  3. Virtual host
  4. Reverse proxy
  5. Load balancing
  6. Dynamic-Static Separation
  7. UrlRewrite

item.title: 初始化服务器(Initializing Server)
item.description:
After reinstalling the system, initialize the centos 7 system.

The following sections are included

  1. IP address, static IP, host name, host file
  2. Firewall Service
  3. epel source and yum source
  4. user and assign permissions
  5. Common tool.(the_silver_searcher, tmux, axel, wget, curl, zsh, oh my zsh, p10k, vim)
